---
title: "Education"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

My academic training combines chemical engineering fundamentals with process systems engineering, dynamic modeling, simulation, optimization, and data-driven methods for complex engineering systems.

::: {.education-list}

::: {.education-box}
::: {.education-header}
### Ph.D. in Chemical Engineering
<span class="education-year">2020–2025</span>
:::

**University of Waterloo**  
Canada

Research focused on coupling metabolic and hydrodynamic compartmental models for bioreactor simulations.

**Selected coursework:**  
Model Building and Response Surface Methodology · Advanced Process Dynamics and Control · Mathematical Cell Biology · Engineering Research Methods, Ethics, Practice, and Law
:::

::: {.education-box}
::: {.education-header}
### M.Eng. in Chemical Engineering
<span class="education-year">2017–2019</span>
:::

**Chemical Engineering Practice School**  
**King Mongkut's University of Technology Thonburi**  
Thailand

Industry-oriented graduate training with emphasis on process modeling, simulation, design, optimization, and industrial research.

**Selected coursework:**  
Process Analysis and Modeling I–II · Optimization of Chemical Processes · Fundamentals of Process Dynamics and Control · Applied Chemical Engineering Thermodynamics · Chemical Reaction Engineering · Mathematical Analysis for Chemical Engineering
:::

::: {.education-box}
::: {.education-header}
### B.Eng. in Chemical Engineering
<span class="education-year">2013–2017</span>
:::

**King Mongkut's University of Technology Thonburi**  
Thailand

Built a strong foundation in chemical engineering principles, process design, and engineering problem solving.

**Selected coursework:**  
Transport Phenomena · Thermodynamics · Chemical Kinetics and Reactor Design · Mass Transfer and Equipment Design · Heat Transfer and Equipment Design · Process Dynamics and Control · Computer-Aided Process Design
:::

:::
